pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing setup_task.sh which explicitly downloads and saves the target file to this specific path.

Verified by reviewing setup_task.sh which downloads from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif, and inspecting TIFF tags via rasterio showing LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR license.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Landsat 7 TOA satellite imagery (verified via embedded TIFF tags indicating 'LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR'). The data is confirmed to be downloaded directly from the opengeos/data GitHub repository to the target path /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif.
